slides.headline: What 30 days of AI leverage actually looks like.
Week 1 — Set up once
body: Your offer, your tone, your client — saved as a Project.

slides.headline: Week 2 — Captions stop being a chore
Week 3 — DMs cleared daily
body: The inbox stops being a wall.

slides.headline: Week 4 — A full day back
body: You coach, you sell, you rest.
Same business, more of you in it.

slides.headline: Want the same 30 days?
